creator: dpolyg@gmail.com
text:
Oh, thank you for the commit!
Actually one of the reasons why I am hesitant to become a maintainer is because... I am not familiar with poudriere. I am using in-house scripts and this worked very well for in-house software support for many years, but I was afraid that this won't work when applied for the large scale. As you can see - this is exactly the case, I am still missing important bits of information. Maybe a bit later, after more RTFM.

Regards,
Denis
